results.title: South Korean president to unveil massive AI and chip investment drive
results.description: The announcement would mark Lee Jae Myung's boldest ‌push yet ‌to align South Korea's AI and chip ambitions with his pledge to the country's narrow ​regional disparities.

results.title: ‘Automation is reshaping, not shrinking talent’ Q&A with John Dawber, VP, GBS Novo Nordisk
results.description: In a conversation with Sudhir Chowdhary, Dawber explains how the company’s Bengaluru-based global capability hub is harnessing AI, data and digital technologies to transform operations, strengthen the pharmaceutical value chain and drive global innovation. He also highlights India’s expanding role in developing technology-led solutions and creating impact across the organisation. Excerpts:

results.title: India, China see top firms lose market dominance in AI lag
results.description: Unlike Taiwan and South Korea, India, China and Hong Kong lack dominant AI champions, leading to lower concentration among their biggest listed companies.
